characters.name: Marcus Vance
characters.mask: A low-level, unassuming L3 junior developer content with simple tasks.
characters.trueNature: A brilliant, perfectionist L9 architect who cannot resist fixing broken systems, even at the cost of his own peace.

characters.name: Richard Sterling
characters.mask: A decisive, authoritative CEO in control of his company.
characters.trueNature: An insecure, incompetent leader who relies on bluster and intimidation to hide his lack of technical understanding.

characters.name: Evelyn Vance
characters.mask: A cold, ruthless, and detached venture capitalist.
characters.trueNature: A predatory opportunist who values results and talent above all else, willing to manipulate anyone to secure her interests.

pressureChoices.pressure: The company's database is failing, and the CEO is about to make a catastrophic error.
pressureChoices.choiceA: Stay hidden as an L3 and let the company fail, preserving his quiet life.
pressureChoices.choiceB: Intervene, reveal his true identity, and take responsibility for the fix.
pressureChoices.chosen: Intervene, reveal his true identity, and take responsibility for the fix.

pressureChoices.pressure: The board is watching, and the system is crashing.
pressureChoices.choiceA: Listen to the engineers and troubleshoot.
pressureChoices.choiceB: Order a hard reset to look decisive, risking massive data loss.
pressureChoices.chosen: Order a hard reset to look decisive, risking massive data loss.

dimensions.positive: takes responsibility to save the team
dimensions.negative: tries to hide from his own talent and duty
makes reckless decisions that endanger the company

emotionalMoments.trigger: realizing he has to abandon his quiet life to fix the architecture.
discovering Marcus Vance is the one fixing the system.

desires.consciousDesire: A simple, stress-free life as a junior developer.
desires.subconsciousDesire: The intellectual satisfaction of solving complex problems and being recognized for his mastery.

desires.consciousDesire: Maintain control and authority over his company.
desires.subconsciousDesire: Validation from the board and the appearance of competence.

desires.consciousDesire: Fix the backend and monetize the company.
desires.subconsciousDesire: Control over high-level talent to ensure her investments succeed.
